raw_text:
Finance 
Dear Finance Team,
I need an invoice for $18,500 from our logistics supplier approved by end of business today. They have explicitly warned us that if payment is not confirmed by then, they will suspend all shipments to our warehouse immediately. This will directly impact our operations and delay orders already committed to clients. Please treat this as a priority.
Regards, Nour

intake.reasoning: The request requires manual approval and payment release for an invoice, which is classified as a non-autonomous task.

task.title: Urgent Invoice Approval
task.description: An invoice for $18,500 from the logistics supplier needs to be approved by the Finance Team. The supplier has warned that if payment is not confirmed by the end of business today, they will suspend all shipments to the warehouse, impacting operations and delaying orders.
task.action_required: Approve the invoice for $18,500
task.success_criteria: Payment confirmation is received by the logistics supplier before the deadline
